summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NIRO V4 Landing Page redesign (Frame 27 wireframe layout). All 14 test features passed successfully. Landing pages load correctly for Love, Career, and Health sub-topics with proper tier switching, pricing, and navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page implementation follows Frame 27 wireframe correctly with all 11 sections
Tier switching is state-based and updates content without page navigation
Supported tier correctly shows 'Recommended' badge on tab, tier card, and sticky CTA
All 18 sub-topics have proper content in landingPageContent.js
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 Landing Page redesign is fully functional. All 18 sub-topics load correctly with proper tier switching. Key test selectors: tile-{subtopic_id}, tier-tab-{tier}, tier-summary-card, start-journey-btn, landing-back-btn, faq-item-{n}, sticky-cta-bar. Login with any email and set localStorage 'niro_onboarding_completed'='true' to skip onboarding.

love_subtopics_landing.details: Tested relationship-healing, family-relationships, dating-compatibility - all load correctly with proper content

career_subtopics_landing.details: Tested career-clarity, job-transition, money-stability - all load correctly with proper pricing

health_subtopics_landing.details: Tested healing-journey, stress-management, energy-balance - all load correctly

tier_selector_tabs.details: Clicking Focussed/Supported/Comprehensive updates tier card, outcomes, and sticky CTA price

supported_recommended_badge.details: Supported tier shows 'Recommended' badge on tab, tier card header, and sticky CTA bar

tier_summary_card.details: Shows correct price, duration, sessions, follow-ups, chat info per tier (e.g., Focussed: 1 session/7 days chat, Supported: 3 sessions/Unlimited, Comprehensive: 5 sessions/Unlimited)

outcomes_section.details: Shows tier-specific outcomes that update when tier is switched

sticky_cta_bar.details: Fixed at bottom, shows correct price for selected tier, includes 'Start my journey' button and trust text

start_journey_checkout.details: Clicking 'Start my journey' navigates to checkout screen with correct tier name and price

checkout_screen.details: Shows order summary with tier name (e.g., 'Relationship Healing - Supported'), price (₹8,999), features, and Pay button

why_niro_section.details: Includes 'Unlimited follow-ups till clarity' bullet as required, plus other trust elements

faq_accordion.details: FAQ items expand/collapse correctly when clicked

remedies_slider.details: Optional Add-ons section appears for sub-topics with remedies (e.g., relationship-healing has pooja, kit, session options)

back_button_navigation.details: Back button on landing page returns to home screen correctly
